# documentUpdate

Updates a document.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`DocumentPayload`](../objects/document_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The identifier of the document to update. Also the identifier from the URL is accepted. |
| `input` | [`DocumentUpdateInput`](../input-objects/document_update_input-input.md)! | `n/a` | No | A partial document object to update the document with. |
